hero.tag: Available for permanent contract — September 2026 · Paris <50km · Remote OK
hero.name: Franck MBE
hero.title: Data Analyst & Data Engineer
hero.description: Passionate about data, specialized in Big Data, Business Intelligence and Data Engineering. I transform raw data into strategic decisions — with Python, Power BI and the Azure ecosystem.

about.title: Data Analyst
paragraphs: With an MBA in Big Data & AI from MBA ESG and hands-on experience as an apprentice at ENI France, I combine analytical rigor with business acumen to deliver actionable insights.
My career spans the entire data value chain: from collection and transformation (ETL pipelines, Azure Data Lake) to visualization and business presentation (Power BI, Tableau, Streamlit).
Bilingual French / English B1-B2, I'm comfortable both in technical environments and presenting insights to non-technical stakeholders.
about.highlight: 🎯 My goal: join a Data team on a permanent contract in Paris (or full-remote) from September 2026 to contribute to impactful data projects with strong business value.
about.cdiSubtitle: Profile available at end of apprenticeship
cdiItems: Sector: All sectors (Energy, Finance, Tech, E-commerce…)
